title: Fix agentic-core symlink and broken tests
description: package.json agentic-core dependency points to link:../agentic-core (WRONG — resolves to standalone agentic-core project with different exports). Must change to link:./packages/agentic-core. Then fix 33 failing tests that import createProvider from old locations. Run pnpm install after fix. All 174 tests must pass.
